column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit drooling at a huge steak" | TEXT="食らいつく！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit surrounded by many shopping bags" | TEXT="大人買い！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit hugging a giant money bill" | TEXT="金の亡者" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit eyes turning into dollar signs" | TEXT="欲望の塊" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit diving into a pool of chocolate" | TEXT="甘い誘惑" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit franticly grabbing limited items" | TEXT="早い者勝ち！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit crying while hugging a new gadget" | TEXT="欲しかったんだ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit ignoring everything to eat ramen" | TEXT="本能のままに" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit laughing madly with treasures" | TEXT="私のものだ！"
